moduleTitle: Principles of Magnets and Magnetic Fields
cpSection: 2.0 Principles of Magnets and Magnetic Fields

lessons.title: Theory of Magnetic Fields
objectives: Describe the earth's magnetic field and fields produced by electrical current
Sketch the magnetic field pattern around magnetized materials

lessons.title: Theory of Magnetism: Domains, Materials, and Flux
objectives: Explain domain theory and classify materials as ferromagnetic, paramagnetic, or diamagnetic
Define flux density and state the basic law of magnetism

lessons.title: Field Properties, Flux Leakage, and Hysteresis
objectives: Describe the properties of magnetic fields and the flux leakage principle that makes MT work
Interpret a hysteresis loop and identify methods used to measure magnetic fields
